detailed_camera_plan: Slow pull back to reveal the full scope of the dining table as秦悍给予鼓励。
action_description: 秦悍对秦嬴的改变感到欣慰并给予鼓励。
staging_description: 餐厅长桌，两人谈话氛围和谐，餐具摆放整齐。

character_poses.秦悍: placing hand on table, gesturing approval

setting_details: Wide view of the Qin estate dining room.
ending_composition_description: Wide shot of the dining room showing both characters, framed by the room architecture.
